prompt: Build a real-time multi-client chat app with ZIO HTTP where multiple users can chat simultaneously, messages appear instantly for all connected users, and users can type their username and message in a form, using Datastar.

assertions.text: Creates ChatRoom service with ZIO Hub.unbounded for broadcasting
Stores message history in Ref and retrieves it on new connections
Implements two-phase SSE: sends history first (ElementPatchMode.Inner), then streams new messages (ElementPatchMode.Append)
POST endpoint uses readSignals[T] to read form data (username and message)
HTML has signals (dataSignals) and dataBind for username and message inputs
Uses dataInit to auto-trigger SSE endpoint on page load
Provides ChatRoom.layer to the server via Server.provide
Displays messages with username and timestamp
